titleStmt.title: SII 5.1150: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1150. (A.R. No. 272 of 1896). ON THE FIRST PILLAR FROM THE LEFT IN THE TIRUCHUTTU-MANDAPA OF THE KURMESVARA TEMPLE AT SRIKURMAM CHICACOLE TALUK, GANJAM DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lakṣmīryasya jagatrayīvijayinī satkuṁbhikuṁbhasta
līsiṁdūrāttapadāṁbujā vijayatē sa śrīnṛsiṁhādhipaḥ .
yatpādāṁbujayyōranugrahasudhālōbhēna dhātrīpatiśrē
ṇīśēkharanīlaratnamadhupāścuṁbaṁttyupāṁttasthalīḥ . 1
Asminrājani rājamānayaśasi kṣāmaṁḍalīṁ śāsati śrīmānpaṁ
ḍitadāsabhūsuravarōmātyāgraṇīrudyayau . saṁtki
ttiḥkila bhāratī ca kamalā yasminguṇōtkarṣatāṁ bhējurbhāvikabhā
ji bhūribhajatāṁ pratyakṣakalpadrumē . 2 . svasti śrī śākavarṣē ra
viravigaṇitē mēṣaśauklyāṁ caturdhyāṁ sōyaṁ śukrasya vārē vara
kamaṭhavibhō rbrāhmavīṇābhinētuḥ . catvāriṁśat�u vīṭhīrapi

ca ṣaḍadhikāṁ viṁśatiṁ piṣṭakānāṁ bhaṁḍārē tasya māḍa
tritayamupanidhāyākarōdyāvadiṁdu Ø 3 Aṣṭaumā
ḍānpunardatvā gāyinyōrmmāṇayugmakaṁ . Annaṁ vīṭhidvayaṁ
cakrē paraṁ svastyayanaṁ vibhōḥ . 4 . śakavarṣaṁbulu 1212 gunēṁṭi
vīraśrīnarasiṁhadēvara vijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 14 śrāhi
mēṣa śukla 4 śukravāramuna śrīkūrmmanāthuni brahmavīṇāsvastya
yenamunaku mahāpātra brāhmaṇadāsapaṁḍitulu naṭṭavuni
ki nottukāṁḍrakuṁgā nela nappālu 26 viḍyalu 40 yiṁṭikiṁ
gā bhaṁḍarunaṁ beṭṭina māḍalu 3 siṁhaḷitya liddaṟaku dina
muna niddumu kūḍu reṁḍu viḍyālaku beṭina māḍalu 8 .
Digital edition of SII 5.1150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
